title: MANUU introduces B Tech, Civil Engineering, and PhD in different faculties
description: Hyderabad: Maulana Azad National Urdu University (MANUU) is inviting applications for online admission in regular mode courses offered at its Main Campus at Hyderabad, Satellite Campuses, Colleges of Teacher Education (CTEs) and Polytechnics across the country for the year 2025-2026.
